completion_promises.evidence: Both files exist and are properly structured. __init__.py exports CorpusDocument, walk_corpus, and publish_episode. walker.py contains the CorpusDocument dataclass and walk_corpus function implementation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: walk_corpus(root: Path) -> Iterator[CorpusDocument] yields each markdown document under root with its resolved path and raw text
completion_promises.evidence: walk_corpus function implemented in walker.py (lines 28-90). It iterates through all .md files using rglob, resolves paths, and yields CorpusDocument instances containing the resolved path and text content. Verified by test_walk_corpus_yields_markdown_documents.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Every yielded path, after Path.resolve(), is contained within the resolved corpus root; entries containing path-traversal segments or symlink escapes are skipped and never read
completion_promises.evidence: Path containment enforced at lines 75-80 of walker.py using is_relative_to() check. The security invariant is: resolved_entry.is_relative_to(resolved_root). Entries that escape are skipped. Verified by test_path_traversal_entry_not_read and test_symlink_escape_not_read - both confirm that malicious paths and symlinks pointing outside the root are never read.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A run over an empty corpus root yields zero documents and does not raise
completion_promises.evidence: Empty directory handling implemented in walker.py lines 49-53. If root doesn't exist or is not a directory, the function returns early with no yields. Verified by test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing which confirms empty corpus yields [] without raising exceptions.

completion_promises.criterion_text: corpus_root (FLEET_MEMORY_CORPUS_ROOT) is added to Settings with the FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix convention
completion_promises.evidence: corpus_root field added to Settings class in settings.py (lines 26-29). Field uses FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix via model_config env_prefix. Default value is './corpus'. Field description explicitly mentions FLEET_MEMORY_CORPUS_ROOT environment variable.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/unit/reindex/test_walker.py covers: a path-traversal entry is not read; an empty directory yields nothing
completion_promises.evidence: Comprehensive test coverage in test_walker.py: test_path_traversal_entry_not_read (lines 29-68) verifies malicious ../ entries are skipped, test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing (lines 16-26) verifies empty directory handling. Additional tests: test_symlink_escape_not_read for symlink safety, test_walk_corpus_yields_markdown_documents for normal operation, test_resolved_path_returned for path resolution. All 5 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Black formatter check passed with 'All done! 6 files would be left unchanged.' No formatting issues detected in reindex package or tests. Full test suite passes: 525 passed, 2 skipped.
